# MailCraft Studio

> Windows email template builder and mail merge software for Outlook. Free to start, one-time in-app purchase for premium features. No subscription. Works offline.

MailCraft Studio is a native Windows desktop application for building professional email templates and running mail merges with Outlook, Hotmail, and Microsoft Live accounts. It follows a freemium model — core features are free, and a one-time in-app purchase unlocks the full premium feature set. No monthly fees, no cloud uploads, and no internet connection required.

## Product Details

- **Name:** MailCraft Studio
- **Platform:** Windows 10, Windows 11
- **Pricing:** Freemium — free core features, one-time in-app purchase for premium (no subscription)
- **Download:** https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9N81V7ZQ9ZS8
- **Category:** Email template builder, mail merge software, bulk email, Outlook tools, Windows productivity

## Free Features

- Drag-and-drop email template builder
- Rich text formatting and HTML editing
- Basic mail merge for Outlook, Hotmail, and Microsoft Live accounts
- CSV contact import with automatic field mapping
- Mobile-optimized responsive templates with real-time preview
- Fully offline operation

## Premium Features (one-time in-app purchase)

- Unlimited bulk email campaigns
- Advanced merge tags
- File attachments in mail merge
- CC/BCC support
- Full premium template library
- Priority support

## Key Differentiators

- **Freemium** — meaningful free tier, no credit card required to start
- **No subscription** — premium is a one-time purchase, not recurring
- **Offline first** — works without an internet connection
- **Privacy focused** — contacts and templates stay on the user's machine
- **Outlook native** — built specifically for Microsoft Outlook, Hotmail, and Live accounts

## Who It's For

- Small business owners sending invoices, proposals, and client follow-ups
- Marketers running bulk email campaigns without a cloud subscription
- Freelancers managing client outreach and project communications
- Sales teams sending personalized prospecting emails at scale
- HR and administrative staff handling announcements and onboarding
- Anyone who sends the same email repeatedly to different people

## Repository Purpose

This public repository serves as the official issue tracker, feature request board, documentation hub, and changelog for MailCraft Studio. The application source code is proprietary.

## Links

- Microsoft Store: https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9N81V7ZQ9ZS8
- Issue tracker: https://github.com/copeosoftwaresolutions/mailcraftstudio-mailmerge-outlook-windows/issues
- Changelog: https://github.com/copeosoftwaresolutions/mailcraftstudio-mailmerge-outlook-windows/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
